chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 121 of 2020 C. P No. D – 793 of 2020 C. P No. D – 655 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.3702/2020 (1 R 10) 3. For hearing of CMA No.575/2020 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 20.10.2021 Mr. Abdul Waheed Bhanbro Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Professor Rukhsar, Principal Khairpur Medical College <><><><><>....<><><><><> Today, statement has been filed by Respondent No.4 / Principal, Khairpur Medical College, Khairpur, which reads as under;- “It is respectfully submitted that after permission from Health Department, Government of Sindh for opening of IDs of staff BS- 01 to BS-05 of Khairpur Medical College, Khairpur salaries have been released by District Account Officer Khairpur since 03 months (Annexure-1), however arrears bill of salaries are ready to submit in the Finance Department through District Accounts Office, Khairpur for permission and allocation of funds of previous years.” Counsel for Petitioners is satisfied therefore, these Petitions are disposed of in the above terms with pending applications. Office to place a signed copy of this order in connected captioned matters. Judge Judge ARBROHI
